_comment: Shipped preset for 4x-UltraSharp GAN upscaler. Pure ESRGAN-style — no diffusion pass, no prompt. Always outputs 4x the input size (model is fixed-scale). The UpscaleStage's `scale` widget is ignored by this workflow; future variants may add an ImageScaleBy to honor it. Read ONCE on first DB row creation.
label: Ultrasharp 4x
description: GAN-based 4x upscale via 4x-UltraSharp. No prompt, no diffusion — fast (~1-3s per 1024px image on a 24GB+ GPU). Output is always 4x the input dimensions; the `scale` widget on this stage is currently a UI hint only.

image.error: Upscale needs an upstream image — wire one into this stage's image input.
